title: Statistics
lede: An overview of how your applications are going: responses, interviews, rejections and trends over time.
summary: You have {total, number} applications in total, of which {sent, number} were sent.

error.title: Could not load statistics
error.body: Something went wrong while loading the statistics. Reload the page and try again.
error.rateLimited: You have loaded statistics many times in a short period. Wait a moment and try again.

empty.title: No statistics yet
empty.body: As soon as you register your first application, statistics start building up here.

rates.heading: Outcomes
rates.intro: The shares are calculated on your sent applications.
rates.empty: You have no sent applications yet. Outcomes appear once you have sent at least one application.

funnel.heading: From sent to accepted
funnel.limitation: {count, plural, =1 {One application ended} other {# applications ended}} outside the process (rejected, withdrawn or no response) and counts only as sent in the funnel. Earlier stages may therefore be undercounted.

statusBreakdown.heading: By status
statusBreakdown.intro: All your applications broken down by status, including drafts.

monthly.heading: Applications per month
monthly.intro: Sent applications over the last twelve months.
